---
name: Propose a new subagent
about: Suggest a new Gemini CLI subagent for the collection
title: "[agent] <name>"
labels: new-agent
---

## Agent name

<!-- The slug, e.g. `graphql-specialist` -->

## Category

<!-- Which category does it belong in? core-development, language-specialists, infrastructure-devops, quality-testing, security, data-ai-databases, developer-experience, specialized-domains, or product-orchestration -->

## What does it do?

<!-- One or two sentences: the single responsibility, and when the main agent should delegate to it. -->

## Why is it worth adding?

<!-- What gap does it fill that the existing agents don't cover? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] It has a single, focused responsibility (not "and also")
- [ ] It doesn't duplicate an existing agent
- [ ] Read-only work (review/audit) wouldn't need write tools
